text.p: Mount Lofty Ranges, Flinders, Mid North, Murraylands and North East Pastoral districts.
The State Emergency Service advises that people should:
* Keep clear of fallen power lines;
* Beware of fallen trees or debris on the road.
* Don't drive, ride or walk through flood water.
* Keep clear of creeks and storm drains.

warning-info.text: No further warnings will be issued for this event.

text.p: Check https://www.bom.gov.au/weather-and-climate/warnings-and-alerts. Warnings are also available through TV and Radio broadcasts or call 1300 659 210. The Bureau and State Emergency Service would appreciate warnings being broadcast regularly.

forecast-period.text: Damaging wind gusts have eased for the Mount Lofty and Flinders Ranges.

text.p: Weather Situation: Damaging westerly wind gusts have eased as the pressure squeeze has weakened.

hazard.text: Mount Lofty Ranges, Flinders, Mid North, Murraylands and North East Pastoral
